Destroy a Ghast with a fireball

translation: Vu mustas esar operacanto en modo kreiva

translation: Bloki di komandi ne esas habilitata en ica servero
Uzez '@s' por skopar la ento exekutanta

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: Avertez! Kande vu signatos la libro, ol ne plus esos redaktebla.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
translation: La maksimuma alteco por konstruo estas %s

source_string: Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: Ka vu certe volas apertar la retloko sequanta?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Ka vu volas apertar ica ligilo o kopiar ol?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Nulafoye apertez ligili de personi qua vu ne fidas!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Personaligita chefostango %s ne havas luderi prezente enrete

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d
Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Nulo chanjis. La ludanto ne esas operacanto
Nun %s ja ne esas operacano di servero

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
translation: La maxim proxima %s esas ye %s (%s bloki fore)

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
translation: La maxim proxima %s esas ye %s (%s bloki fore)

source_string: Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Nulo chanjis. La ludanto ja esas operacanto

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.
There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard
Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: Skopo sive ja havas la tago o havas tro multa tagi

source_string: Target does not have this tag
Failed to connect to the server
Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: Alternative, hike esas kelka ni facis plu frue!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: Ka vu volas partigar vua predefino? Uzez la suba buxo!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
%1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s marchis aden kaktuso dum ke esforcis eskapar %2$s

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block

translation: %1$s marchis aden fairo dum ke kombatis %2$s

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s probis natar en lavao por eskapar %2$s

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
translation: %1$s brulesis til cindri dum ke kombatis %2$s

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
%1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
%1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
translation: %1$s falis tro fore e finigesis per %2$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s falis tro fore e finigesis per %2$s kun %3$s

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Ica demo duros por kin dii enluda. Esforcez vua maxim bona!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Vu pasis vua dio kinesma. Uzez %s por savar skrenkapto di vua kreado.

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Ica demo duros 5 dii enluda (cirkum 1 horo e 40 minuti di tempo reala). Spektez la avanci por indici! Havez bona tempo!
Uzez la %1$s klavo por apertar vua inventario

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: Uzez la klavi %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s e la mauso por movar

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: La tempo di demo jus expiris. Komprez la ludo por durar o startar mondo nova!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Ka vu certe volas koaktar la desfacileso di vua mondo? Ico definos la mondo estar todos %1$s, e vu ni povos changar ito itere.

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: Sesiono nevalida (probez ristartar vua ludo e la startilo)

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: La aŭtentigaj serviloj nuntempas neatingeblaj. Bonvolu reprovi.

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?
translation: Ka vu certe volas efacar ica servero?
